chunks.text: Technical Reports - Daniel Klein. Benchmarking LLMs on Advanced Mathematical Reasoning (EECS-2025-121) Jonathan Yue and Daniel Klein. Measuring General Intelligence with Generated Games (EECS-2025-60) Vivek Verma, David Huang, William Chen, Daniel Klein and Nicholas Tomlin. Constructing Taxonomies from Pretrained Language Models (EECS-2024-141) Catherine Chen, Kevin Lin and Daniel Klein. Motion Diffusion From Speech (EECS-2024-113) Kushal Khangaonkar, Sanjay Subramanian, Daniel Klein and Trevor Darrell.

Generating Optimal Molecules with Synthesizability and 3D Equivariant Conformational Constraints (EECS-2023-257). Abstract Syntax Networks for Code Generation and Semantic Parsing (EECS-2019-172) Maxim Rabinovich, Mitchell Stern and Daniel Klein. Probabilistically Modeling Semantic Change (EECS-2015-36) Aleksandr Nisnevich, David Hall and Daniel Klein. An All-Fragments Grammar for Simple and Accurate Parsing (EECS-2012-34) Mohit Bansal and Daniel Klein.

Probabilistic Models of Evolution and Language Change (EECS-2010-153) Alexandre Bouchard-Cote, Michael Jordan, Daniel Klein, Thomas L. Griffiths and Yun S. Song. Fully Distributed EM for Very Large Datasets (EECS-2007-178) Jason Wolfe, Aria Delier Haghighi and Daniel Klein.
